prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is H-202 Terminations & balancing within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.2 Distribution. The observed field condition is: missing balancing dampers at branch takeoffs. The work is being assessed at the in-service lifecycle state with source anchors SMACNA, TAB reports.
title: T2 H-202 Fault diagnosis
